usage: create_rc_corner [-help] [-T <temperatureValue>] [-cap_table <capTableFile>] -name <rcCornerName> [-postRoute_cap {capFactor1 capFactor2 capFactor3}] [-postRoute_clkcap {capFactor1 capFactor2 capFactor3}] [-postRoute_clkres {resFactor1 resFactor2 resFactor3}] [-postRoute_res {resFactor1 resFactor2 resFactor3}] [-postRoute_xcap {xcapFactor1 xcapFactor2 xcapFactor3}] [-preRoute_cap <capFactor>] [-preRoute_clkcap <capFactor>] [-preRoute_clkres <resFactor>] [-preRoute_res <resFactor>] [-qx_tech_file <fileName>] [-thru_substrate_cell_subckt_file <fileName>] [-via_variation_file <fileName>]

options.name: -T
options.description: Specifies a new temperature, in units of Celsius, to use to derate resistance values

options.name: -cap_table
options.description: Specifies a new capacitance table (file) to use for extraction when using this RC corner

options.name: -name
options.description: Specifies the name for the RC corner object being created

options.name: -postRoute_cap
options.description: {capFactor1 capFactor2 capFactor3} Specifies the capacitance scale factor for RC Extraction in post-route mode

options.name: -postRoute_clkcap
options.description: {capFactor1 capFactor2 capFactor3} Specifies the clock capacitance scale factor for RC extraction in post-route mode with the effortLevel parameter set to low

options.name: -postRoute_clkres
options.description: {resFactor1 resFactor2 resFactor3} Specifies the clock resistance scale factor for RC extraction in post-route mode with the effortLevel parameter set to low

options.name: -postRoute_res
options.description: {resFactor1 resFactor2 resFactor3} Specifies the resistance scale factor for RC extraction in post-route mode with the effortLevel parameter set to low

options.name: -postRoute_xcap
options.description: {xcapFactor1 xcapFactor2 xcapFactor3} Specifies a new cross-coupling capacitance scale factor

options.name: -preRoute_cap
options.description: Specifies the capacitance scale factor for RC Extraction in pre-route mode

options.name: -preRoute_clkcap
options.description: Specifies the clock capacitance scale factor for RC Extraction in pre-route mode

options.name: -preRoute_clkres
options.description: Specifies the clock resistance scale factor for RC Extraction in pre-route mode

options.name: -preRoute_res
options.description: Specifies the resistance scale factor for RC Extraction in pre-route mode

options.name: -qx_tech_file
options.description: Specifies a new QRC technology (.tch) file which is used to perform sign-off RC extraction

options.name: -thru_substrate_cell_subckt_file
options.description: <fileName> Specifies file containing subcircuit models for FTV cells

options.name: -via_variation_file
options.description: Specifies a file for modeling via variation
